memoryArtifacts.headline: Restormel Castle. This circular ruin is at the end of a lane about a mile north of Lostwithiel. The copyright on this image is owned by Chris Downer and is licensed for reuse under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 2.0 license.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton於1172年出生在英國可瓦爾卡迪納姆時，他的父親Robert de Cardinham II27歲，母親Matilda Fitz Roger18歲。他於1190年與Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 恩德利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1252年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾藍利福利享年81歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾洛斯特維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton于1172年出生在英国可瓦爾卡迪納姆时，他的父亲Robert de Cardinham II27岁，母亲Matilda Fitz Roger18岁。他于1190年与Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 恩德利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1252年在英国英格兰可瓦爾藍利福利享年81岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾洛斯特維爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton was born in 1172, in Cardinham, Cornwall, England, his father, Robert de Cardinham II, was 27 and his mother, Matilda Fitz Roger, was 18. He married Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam in 1190, in St Endellion, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1252, in Lanlivery, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Lostwithiel, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton est né en 1172, à Cardinham, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Cardinham II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Matilda Fitz Roger, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam en 1190, à St Endellion, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1252, à Lanlivery, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Lostwithiel, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.Saint Endellion, Cornwall, England: St Endellion, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton 1172 in Cardinham, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Cardinham II 27 und seine Mutter Matilda Fitz Roger 18. Er hat 1190 in St Endellion, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1252 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Lanlivery, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lostwithiel, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton è nato il nel 1172 nel Cardinham, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Robert de Cardinham II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Fitz Roger, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam nel 1190, nel St Endellion, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1252, nel Lanlivery, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Lostwithiel, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngtonが1172年にイギリスコルンワルカーディンハムで生まれた時，父Robert de Cardinham IIは27歳，母Matilda Fitz Rogerは18歳であった。1190年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト エンデリオンでIsabella de Hastings FitzWilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1252年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルランリベリーで81歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルロストウィスエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton(이)가 1172년 영국 코른월 카딘함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Cardinham II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Fitz Roger(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 엔들리언에서 Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1252년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 랜라이버리에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 로스트위스이에 묻혔다.

pt.Saint Endellion, Cornwall, England: St Endellion, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton nasceu em 1172, em Cardinham, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Cardinham II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Fitz Roger, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam em 1190, em St Endellion, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1252, em Lanlivery, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Lostwithiel, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ro.Saint Endellion, Cornwall, England: St Endellion, Cornwall, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton родился в 1172 г. в местности кардинам, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Cardinham II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Fitz Roger, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam в 1190 г. в местности ст энделлион, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1252 г. в местности ланливири, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности лоствитиел, корнвалл, Англия.

Se casó con Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam en 1190, en St Endellion, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1252, en Lanlivery, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Lostwithiel, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
